articles.description: Ripple chief technology officer David Schwartz says the San Francisco payments company is looking at ways to bring non-fungible tokens (NFTs) to the XRP Ledger. Bybit adds Cardano, Polkadot, and Uniswap to its trading platform
articles.description: Leading crypto derivatives trading platform Bybit is launching three new USDT trading pairs. Going forward, Bybit users will have access to UNI, DOT, and ADA as USDT-margined perpetual contracts. Traders will be free to choose between 1x and 25x for trading the new pairs. articles.title: Bybit Adds ADA, DOT and UNI to Its USDT Margined Offerings
articles.description: SINGAPORE, March 18, 2021 — Cryptocurrency derivatives exchange Bybit has announced today the arrival of three new USDT trading pairs with Cardano’s ADA, Polkadot’s DOT, and Uniswap’s UNI. The introduction of these new trading pairs is the second expansion of Bybit’s markets in as many weeks, following the arrival of the BTCUSD0625 futures contract onRead More
